mapper.sql: from payment_refund_order ro join payment_order po on po.id = ro.payment_order_id and po.tenant_id = ro.tenant_id join payment_business_order bo on bo.id = po.business_order_id and bo.tenant_id = po.tenant_id left join payment_method m on m.id = po.method_id and m.tenant_id = po.tenant_id left join payment_channel c on c.id = po.channel_id and c.tenant_id = po.tenant_id left join payment_channel_contract cc on cc.id = po.contract_id and cc.tenant_id = po.tenant_id

where ro.tenant_id = #{tenantId} and bo.del_flag = 0
and ro.status in ('REFUNDING', 'PROCESSING')
and ro.status = #{statusCode}
and ( ro.refund_order_no like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or ro.biz_refund_no like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or ro.status like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or ro.channel_refund_no like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or po.pay_order_no like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or po.channel_trade_no like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or bo.biz_order_no like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or bo.app_code like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or m.method_name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or m.method_code like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or c.channel_code like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or c.channel_name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') )

select ro.id, ro.refund_order_no as refundOrderNo, ro.biz_refund_no as bizRefundNo, ro.payment_order_id as paymentOrderId, po.contract_id as contractId, bo.id as businessOrderId, po.pay_order_no as payOrderNo, bo.biz_order_no as bizOrderNo, bo.title, bo.app_code as appId, m.method_code as methodCode, m.method_name as methodName, c.channel_code as channelCode, c.channel_name as channelName, coalesce(po.channel_merchant_no, cc.merchant_no) as channelMerchantNo, po.channel_trade_no as channelTradeNo, ro.channel_refund_no as channelRefundNo, ro.refund_amount as refundAmount, bo.currency, ro.reason, ro.status, ro.refund_time as refundTime, ro.created_at as createTime, ro.updated_at as updateTime
mapper.select: order by ro.created_at desc limit #{limit} offset #{offset}
mapper.update: update payment_refund_order set status = #{status}, refund_time = #{refundTime}, updated_at = now() where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and id = #{id} and status in ('REFUNDING', 'PROCESSING')
mapper.select: select ro.id, ro.refund_order_no as refundOrderNo, ro.biz_refund_no as bizRefundNo, ro.payment_order_id as paymentOrderId, ro.channel_refund_no as channelRefundNo, ro.refund_amount as refundAmount, ro.reason, ro.status, ro.refund_time as refundTime, ro.tenant_id as tenantId, ro.created_by as createdBy, ro.created_at as createdAt, ro.updated_by as updatedBy, ro.updated_at as updatedAt from payment_refund_order ro where ro.tenant_id = #{tenantId} and ro.channel_refund_no = #{channelRefundNo} order by ro.created_at desc limit 1

select ro.id, ro.refund_order_no as refundOrderNo, ro.biz_refund_no as bizRefundNo, ro.payment_order_id as paymentOrderId, ro.channel_refund_no as channelRefundNo, ro.refund_amount as refundAmount, ro.reason, ro.status, ro.refund_time as refundTime, ro.tenant_id as tenantId, ro.created_by as createdBy, ro.created_at as createdAt, ro.updated_by as updatedBy, ro.updated_at as updatedAt from payment_refund_order ro join payment_order po on po.id = ro.payment_order_id and po.tenant_id = ro.tenant_id where ro.tenant_id = #{tenantId} and po.channel_code = #{channelCode} and po.contract_id = #{contractId} and ro.status = 'SUCCESS' and ro.refund_time >= #{billDate} and ro.refund_time < #{nextBillDate} order by ro.refund_time asc, ro.refund_order_no asc
